name: LSASS Process Access by Mimikatz
description: Detection of suspicious process access to LSASS.exe, highly indicative of credential dumping attempts by tools like Mimikatz.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process access event.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where LSASS access was detected.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the source process ran.

parameters.name: SourceImage
parameters.description: The full path to the process that attempted to access LSASS.

parameters.name: SourceProcessId
parameters.description: The Process ID (PID) of the source process.

parameters.name: TargetImage
parameters.description: The full path to the target process (lsass.exe).

parameters.name: TargetProcessId
parameters.description: The Process ID (PID) of the target process (lsass.exe).

parameters.name: GrantedAccess
parameters.description: The hexadecimal value of the access rights granted to the source process.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
